'''Lorell''' was a [[planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It lay in a [[Lorell system/Legends|system]] just outside the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. It was once base of the [[Lorell Raiders]] and was later known for its [[kickboxing]].

{{Planet-stub}}
